cases.notes: Known long-tail ext PDP. Earlier production probes oscillated between client timeout and HTTP 200, so keep it as the primary shared-pressure watch sample.

Appeared as a transient 502 during the same shared-pressure sweep, but returned HTTP 200 when reprobed alone.
Third transient 502 candidate from the shared-pressure sweep. Use it to distinguish single-product data issues from capacity jitter.
